summary: The complete origin/main...e3c7d93b change union preserves the guarded runtime contract. The public one-command path remains bounded to diagnose, artifact preparation, implementation, verification, independent review, needs_changes repair, and final PR-ready preparation; PR creation, merge, waiver, deployment, publication, and material external side effects remain outside autonomous authority. The schema-v2 reconciliation fix resolves only the selected Story's declared PR route and mirrors, while existing legacy flat-route and rollback behavior remains covered. No blocking API, persistence, authority, provider, dependency, or environment regression was found.
inspection_summary: Inspected the complete changed-file union and production owners for guarded orchestration, run-session state, typed stops/resume, current-HEAD enforcement, managed-worktree authority, provider task projection, and Story-scoped delivery reconciliation. Confirmed the runtime registry has no autonomous pr_create, merge, or waiver action; implementation results and review evidence are rebound or rejected against the authoritative managed-worktree HEAD; runtime and human-decision stops retain typed recovery and resume commands; and provider-created planning artifacts explicitly prohibit external delivery actions. Verified exact-HEAD evidence: full suite 2028/2028, focused suite 209/209, one-command E2E 5/5, execution-state integration 51/51, gate-ledger integration 2/2, schema parsing 19/19, sequence-targeted 124/124, architecture-boundary review pass, and target-architecture conformance parity with origin/main at 85 total violations (65 undeclared dependencies, 9 budget violations, 11 orphan modules). The observed dogfood dispatch orphan was an operator/process-local connector condition and persisted as a typed bounded stop; it does not contradict the production-path E2E or expand runtime authority.

remediation_addendum.reason: The earlier inspected_inputs metadata named two nonexistent test paths even though the verdict relied on the real test surfaces and their exact-HEAD TAP evidence.
remediation_addendum.reviewed_surface: The reviewed Git surface is unchanged at e3c7d93bdc6fb9d04964bb3f2f5248b9b93e5c01; this correction changes review evidence metadata only.

actual_paths_and_relevance.relevance: Directly covers schema 0.2 selected-Story PR routing and linked managed/source synchronization, plus configured legacy routing, transaction rollback, and unrelated-authority preservation.

Directly covers bounded provider objectives, managed-worktree capabilities, forbidden external authority seams, typed runtime and human stops, current-HEAD final preparation, needs_changes repair, and convergence bounds.

Directly covers the public guarded Run through managed-worktree implementation, distinct read-only review, repair and re-verification on the repaired HEAD, typed stop/resume flows, schema-v2 reconciliation, and the action plan exclusion of PR creation, merge, and waiver.

judgment_delta: Initial concern: schema-v2 delivery reconciliation might construct an undeclared ownership-probe Story and bypass the selected route. Resolution: the patch now derives locations only from the selected Story catalog entry, validates whether the canonical template is Story-scoped, and uses matching managed/source mirrors; linked schema-v2, legacy flat-route, and rollback tests cover the resulting path surface.

Initial concern: implementation or repair could leave evidence bound to an earlier commit. Resolution: guarded-run-session verifies the authoritative managed-worktree HEAD after implementation, review dispatch refuses stale bindings, repair replays verification, and final preparation requires the prepared HEAD and current HEAD to match.

Initial concern: one-command autonomy or provider projection could cross the human authority boundary. Resolution: the autonomous action allowlist excludes PR creation, merge, waiver, deployment, publication, and external side effects, and the inspected provider execution/handoff artifacts repeat those prohibitions with local-workspace-only capabilities.

Initial concern: the actual dogfood provider task was not imported into the original run after a process-local connector poll reported an orphan. Resolution: the run retained a typed max_iterations_exceeded stop, the provider output itself remained a planning-artifacts-only projection, and exact-HEAD production-shaped E2E evidence independently proves the guarded happy path and typed recovery matrix. This is an evidence limitation for that operator run, not a runtime-contract defect.
inspected_inputs: git diff --stat and git diff origin/main...e3c7d93b for all 18 changed files
